title: Known flight risk followed by bond outcome and failure to appear
claim_text: A defendant with documented flight-risk indicators posted a $150,000 bond, failed to appear before trial, and had the bond forfeited; multiple reports align that the bond path allowed passport retention.
notes: Primary court records support bond, failure to appear, forfeiture, and documented flight risk. Exact two-option passport mechanics remain secondary-aligned pending bail transcript or bond conditions order.
